title: CHILDREN'S PROGRAMS - 211info
text: IRCO PACIFIC ISLANDER AND ASIAN FAMILY CENTER CHILDREN'S PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Program focuses on early childhood development through case management home visits that include parent education and skill building, developmental and health screenings, kindergarten readiness and transition, and navigating community resources. Safety and intervention for families in crisis to help children remain in the home or help reunify the family. 8040 NE Sandy Boulevard Suite 200 Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Most Children's Programs: Ages 0-5 Child Abuse Prevention and Intervention Services (CAPI): Age 18 and younger Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (971) 271-6500 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Program phone (971) 271-6500 Danita Huynh [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. Must fill out intake documents at first home visit. Clients are sometimes referred by other agencies and other IRCO programs. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of address LANGUAGES: Languages staff speak in Early Childhood Programs: English, Burmese, Zomi, Chinese, Vietnamese, Cambodian, Spanish, Russian, Bosnian, Somali, Romanian, Thai, Ukrainian, Farsi, Bosnian, Karen, Mien, Serbo-Croatian, French, Lingala, and Swahili AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 12 and 72 Services: Family Preservation Programs Home Based Parenting Education Intensive Family Reunification Services Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH ACADEMIC SUPPORT AND PARENT ENGAGEMENT HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH NAVIGATION HOUSING/SHELTER - EMERGENCY RENTAL ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE FOR FAMILIES WITH CHILDREN INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ASIAN AND PACIFIC ISLANDER DEVELOPMENT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SERVICES AGAINST EXPLOITATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH MENTORING LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - GANG PREVENTION AND INTERVENTION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - FAMILY PROGRAMS UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. IRCO PACIFIC ISLANDER AND ASIAN FAMILY CENTER
